'''Tal Pak''' was a notorious [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was an oily fellow with a rat-like face and rotting teeth. He met with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents in the [[Red Moon Saloon]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] where he sold them information on the location of vital [[Starship/Legends|starship]] spare parts. He was betrayed by his henchman [[Vassk]], who had tipped the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. When fighting broke out between [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and the Rebels in the Red Moon Saloon, Pak grabbed the money the Rebels had paid him and tried to flee amidst the shooting.
